description_long: This is a compact, modern-style bungalow with a flat roof and a prominent striped awning over the main entrance. The front facade features large glass double doors flanked by two wide windows, all shaded by the red-and-white awning. Decorative planter boxes with green shrubs line the front and sides, adding a touch of greenery. The side view reveals additional windows arranged vertically and a smaller striped awning, while the rear is plain with only planters and a single window. The roof includes a small rooftop unit and a ladder, suggesting access for maintenance. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on functionality and curb appeal.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a striped awning, large front windows, and decorative planters lining the exterior.
description_view_0: The side view shows a large window, a small rooftop unit, a striped awning extending from the right, and planter boxes along the base.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main entrance with double glass doors, a wide striped awning, symmetrical windows, and planters lining the facade.
description_view_2: The opposite side view features vertically stacked windows, a small rooftop unit, a striped awning on the left, and planter boxes at the base.
description_view_3: The rear view is plain, with no windows or doors, only planters along the base and a visible rooftop unit.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with vertical side windows
